message.content:
Explore the project at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/. I need to understand the component structure for writing unit tests. Please:

1. List all component directories under src/components/
2. Read the main component files for: list/list.tsx, list/list_item/list_item.tsx, search_bar/search_bar.tsx, action_panel/action_panel.tsx
3. Read src/types.ts
4. Read src/test_setup.ts
5. Check if there are any existing test files (*.test.tsx, *.spec.tsx)
6. Read the vitest config (check vite.config.ts for test config)

Give me the full contents of each file you read.

content.text: I'll explore the project structure and read the requested files. Let me start by gathering all the information in parallel where possible.
